da.hero_lead: Yoga Bible er for dig, der vil videre. Bliv certificeret yogalærer — eller fordyb dig i din egen praksis gennem målrettede forløb.
da.hero_img_alt: Yogalærer i praksis — Yoga Bible København
da.programs_subtitle: To veje til samme mål: 200-timers Yoga Alliance certificering. Vælg det format, der passer dit liv.
da.prog18_tagline: Ved siden af job eller studie
da.courses_subtitle: 4 uger · 8 sessioner · For dig der vil mestre ét område
da.inv_desc: Handstand, forearm stand, headstand. Lær setup, entries, bailouts og spotting. Fokus på skulderaktivering, core-engagement og skadesforebyggelse. Fra væg til freestanding — i dit eget tempo.
da.splits_desc: Front splits, middle splits, oversplits. Hoftemobilitet og hamstring-fleksibilitet gennem aktiv/passiv stretching, PNF-teknikker og nervesystem-arbejde. Sikker progression uden at forcere.
da.back_desc: Wheel, kapotasana, drop-backs. Bryst- og skulderåbning, thoracic mobilitet, ryg- og core-styrke. Lær at bøje fra de rigtige steder — og beskytte lænden.
da.courses_bundle: Tag alle tre kurser og spar 15%
da.studio_img_alt: Yoga Bible studie i København — klasse i gang
da.studio_text: Christianshavn, København. Hot room + main studio. Et rum skabt til fordybelse, fællesskab og vækst.
da.testimonial1_quote: "18-ugers programmet ændrede mit liv. Instruktørerne skaber et trygt rum til at udforske og vokse. Jeg føler mig nu klar til at undervise med ægte selvtillid."
da.testimonial2_quote: "Inversions-kurset var præcis hvad jeg havde brug for. Fra at være bange for at kicke op til stabil handstand. Progressionen er gennemtænkt og sikker."
da.testimonial3_quote: "Det 4-ugers intensive var transformerende. Real-class praksis gjorde hele forskellen — jeg følte mig virkelig forberedt til at stå foran en klasse."
da.why1_desc: Du underviser rigtige klasser under supervision — ikke kun dine medstuderende. Når du er færdig, har du allerede erfaring.
da.why2_desc: Max 20 per hold. Personlig feedback, tæt community, og instruktører der kender dit navn og din praksis.
da.why3_desc: Vores lead instructors har 10+ års undervisningserfaring og aktiv praksis. De underviser stadig dagligt.
da.why4_desc: Alumni-netværk, mentorship, fortsættelsesuddannelser. Certificeringen er starten — ikke slutningen.
da.cta_text: Få skemaet, stil spørgsmål, eller ansøg direkte. Vi svarer inden 24 timer.

en.hero_lead: Yoga Bible is for those who want to go further. Become a certified yoga teacher — or deepen your own practice through focused programs.
en.hero_img_alt: Yoga teacher in practice — Yoga Bible Copenhagen
en.programs_subtitle: Two paths to the same goal: 200-hour Yoga Alliance certification. Choose the format that fits your life.
en.courses_subtitle: 4 weeks · 8 sessions · For those who want to master one area
en.inv_desc: Handstand, forearm stand, headstand. Learn setup, entries, bailouts, and spotting. Focus on shoulder activation, core engagement, and injury prevention. From wall to freestanding — at your own pace.
en.splits_desc: Front splits, middle splits, oversplits. Hip mobility and hamstring flexibility through active/passive stretching, PNF techniques, and nervous system work. Safe progression without forcing.
en.back_desc: Wheel, kapotasana, drop-backs. Chest and shoulder opening, thoracic mobility, back and core strength. Learn to bend from the right places — and protect your lower back.
en.courses_bundle: Take all three courses and save 15%
en.studio_img_alt: Yoga Bible studio in Copenhagen — class in session
en.studio_text: Christianshavn, Copenhagen. Hot room + main studio. A space designed for depth, community, and growth.
en.testimonial1_quote: "The 18-week program changed my life. The instructors create a safe space to explore and grow. I now feel ready to teach with genuine confidence."
en.testimonial2_quote: "The inversions course was exactly what I needed. From being afraid to kick up to a stable handstand. The progression is thoughtful and safe."
en.testimonial3_quote: "The 4-week intensive was transformative. Real-class practice made all the difference — I felt truly prepared to stand in front of a class."
en.why1_desc: You teach real classes under supervision — not just your fellow students. When you graduate, you already have experience.
en.why2_desc: Max 20 per cohort. Personal feedback, tight community, and instructors who know your name and your practice.
en.why3_desc: Our lead instructors have 10+ years of teaching experience and active practice. They still teach daily.
en.why4_desc: Alumni network, mentorship, continuing education. The certification is the beginning — not the end.
en.cta_text: Get the schedule, ask questions, or apply directly. We respond within 24 hours.
